channel.title: WPR Court Tracker - case activity
channel.description: New activity on Marathon County court cases tracked by the Wausau Pilot & Review newsroom.

item.title: Court record updated: Wausau man pleads not guilty to bail jumping, disorderly conduct charges
item.description: State of Wisconsin vs. Robert Edward Dewayne Stevens Jr - the official court record changed. Open the case file for the reporting.

item.title: Court record updated: Wausau man pleads not guilty to bail jumping, disorderly conduct charges
item.description: State of Wisconsin vs. Robert Edward Dewayne Stevens Jr - the official court record changed. Open the case file for the reporting.

item.title: Wausau man pleads not guilty to bail jumping, disorderly conduct charges
item.description: Pretrial conference held; judicial pretrial scheduled for Sept. 30.

item.title: Court record updated: Battery charge dismissed, disorderly conduct sentence deferred for Marathon County supervisor
item.description: State of Wisconsin vs. Nicholas Michael Endres - the official court record changed. Open the case file for the reporting.

item.title: Wausau man pleads not guilty to bail jumping, disorderly conduct charges
item.description: Criminal complaint filed; Stevens pleaded not guilty at his initial appearance and cash bond was set at $150 with sobriety and pretrial monitoring conditions.

item.title: Battery charge dismissed, disorderly conduct sentence deferred for Marathon County supervisor
